description: Update README.md with v4.1 version log entry describing the Config REST API and UI/UX improvements, add API documentation section
steps: In README.md version log table, add a v4.1 entry: date 2026-05-22, content describing Config REST API (GET/PUT /api/config, /api/models) + Settings page fully functional + Personas page card grid with avatars/search + Index quick analysis widget + Stocks page polish + responsive CSS. Also update v4.2 roadmap item to mark UI/UX as done (checkbox checked).

In the Web Dashboard section of README.md, update the feature descriptions: change Settings from '开发中' to functional (Agent模型配置), update the Personas description to mention card grid with avatars and search. Add a new subsection '### REST API Endpoints' under the Web Dashboard section listing all new endpoints: GET /api/config, PUT /api/config, GET /api/config/persona/{id}, PUT /api/config/persona/{id}, GET /api/models, POST /api/custom-persona, GET /api/schema/persona, with brief descriptions.
Update the roadmap section: mark v4.1 and v4.2 as completed with [x], adjust descriptions to match what was actually built
acceptance_criteria: README.md contains v4.1 version log entry with correct date and description
Web Dashboard section shows all 5 pages as functional (no '开发中')
REST API endpoints section documents all 7 new endpoints
Roadmap shows v4.1 and v4.2 as completed
verification: python -c "import pathlib; r = pathlib.Path('README.md').read_text(); assert 'v4.1' in r; assert '/api/config' in r; assert '/api/models' in r; print('README OK')"
